zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson於大約1415年出生在蘇格蘭培爾金努爾時，她的父親William John de Erskine21歲，母親Margaret Agnes Maitland31歲。她於1441年與Lord Alexander Gibson在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾度福利斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1478年在蘇格蘭度福利爾桑哈爾享年64歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson于大约1415年出生在苏格兰培爾金努爾时，她的父亲William John de Erskine21岁，母亲Margaret Agnes Maitland31岁。她于1441年与Lord Alexander Gibson在英国苏格兰度福利爾度福利斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1478年在苏格兰度福利爾桑哈爾享年64岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Erskine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Erskine in Renfrewshire, first recorded in 1226 in the form Erskyn.
History: A family of this name have held a number of Scottish titles, including the earldoms of Mar, Buchan, Kellie, and Rosslyn.

variants.name: Erskin
meanings: Scottish (central Scotland and Fife): variant of   Erskine  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson was born about 1415, in Kinnoull, Perthshire, Scotland, her father, William John de Erskine, was 21 and her mother, Margaret Agnes Maitland, was 31. She married Lord Alexander Gibson in 1441, in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1478, in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, at the age of 64, and was buried in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Ann d’Erskine Baroness Gibson est née environ 1415, à Kinnoull, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, William John d’Erskine, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret Agnes Maitland, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Alexander Gibson en 1441, à Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1478, à Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson um 1415 in Kinnoull, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William John de Erskine 21 und ihre Mutter Margaret Agnes Maitland 31. Sie hat 1441 in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Lord Alexander Gibson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1478 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland und wurde in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson è nata il circa 1415 nel Kinnoull, Perthshire, Scotland, sua padre, William John de Erskine, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Margaret Agnes Maitland, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Lord Alexander Gibson nel 1441, nel Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1478, nel Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibsonが約1415年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアキノウルで生まれた時，父William John de Erskineは21歳，母Margaret Agnes Maitlandは31歳であった。1441年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダムフリーズでLord Alexander Gibsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1478年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアサンクハーで64歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson(이)가 대략 1415년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 킨우에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William John de Erskine(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Agnes Maitland(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1441년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 드프리스에서 Lord Alexander Gibson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1478년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 산크하르에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson nasceu aproximadamente 1415, em Kinnoull, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, William John de Erskine, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Agnes Maitland, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord Alexander Gibson em 1441, em Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1478, em Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson родилась около 1415 г. в местности кинноулл, пиртшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени William John de Erskine было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Agnes Maitland, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Alexander Gibson в 1441 г. в местности думфриесь, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1478 г. в местности санкухар, думфриессхир, Шотландия в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson nació aproximadamente 1415, en Kinnoull, Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, William John de Erskine, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Margaret Agnes Maitland, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Lord Alexander Gibson en 1441, en Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1478, en Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
